Professional
Creative
Gaming
Screen Size
Screen size is determined by measuring from one corner to another on a diagonal axis.

Resolution
The highest pixel count that the monitor can display naturally. Higher resolution equals a better picture/image.

Eye Comfort Certification
Dell eye comfort monitors are TUV Rheinland-certified for optimizing display quality and reducing blue light. Learn More

macOS Compatibility
Requires Thunderbolt, USB-C or HDMI connectivity. Daisy-chaining displays requires Thunderbolt. Some M-series chips may not support certain features. Check device for compatibility.

Please enter values between RM 349 and RM 13,519.

PC Speakers & Soundbars

Learn more about our monitor technology

  • Choosing the right monitor: beyond screen size
    When shopping for a monitor, it’s crucial to consider not only the great visuals and screen size, but also its overall dimensions, to ensure it fits perfectly in your workspace.
  • Diagonal screen size vs. physical size
    The screen size, measured diagonally, doesn’t include the adjustable stand and bezel, which add to the monitor’s physical size. Make sure to check both the screen size and full dimensions to find the perfect fit.
  • Discover incredible screen performance
    Enjoy a superior front-of-screen experience with industry-leading panel technology that delivers incredible color coverage and sharp, lifelike images with up to 99.8% DCI-P3, IPS Black and up to 8K resolution.
  • Experience enhanced productivity
    Power productivity with the range that offers the most extensive array of ports, the highest number of ultrawide monitors, and intelligent multi-tasking features.
  • Collaborate like you’re there
    Experience best-in-class collaboration with monitors built for teamwork, featuring premium optical and audio technology and intelligent features that enhance video conferencing.
  • Lightning-fast performance
    Exceptionally high refresh rates of Alienware monitors give games smooth motion on-screen. Fast gray-to-gray response times mean clear motion even in fast-paced games.
    Learn More
  • Console-friendly
    Alienware monitors offer resolutions, refresh rates, and ports compatible with next-gen gaming consoles, delivering immersive displays and topline performance for gamers.​
    Learn More
  • Built-in Low Blue Light Solution
    Reduces 30% more harmful low blue light than competition* while delivering excellent colour accuracy.
  • High Refresh Rate
    Up to 120Hz refresh rate produces smoother visual with less motion blur and reduces flicker for a more comfortable and productive work experience.
  • Ambient Light Management
    Automatically adjust screen brightness and colour to match the environment, reducing eye fatigue.
  • Environmental standards
    Our monitors feature the latest ecolabels, including EPEAT Gold with Climate+*, ENERGY STAR®, and the newest TCO Certified certification. With the updated TCO certification, monitors are built using up to 15% renewable energy and contains fewer harmful chemicals in its cables.
  • Designing out waste
    We are using recycled materials in our products to help lower e-waste. Depending on the monitor, recycled materials could include recycled plastic, recycled steel, recycled aluminum and recycled glass.*
  • Packaging with purpose
    Our monitors ship in packaging made from 100% renewable materials while reducing plastic* and paper waste. Reducing paper usage is the equivalent to saving 545 trees annually*.
  • Refresh your tech responsibly
    We can help you responsibly and securely retire your legacy IT equipment, regardless of brand, while addressing your sustainability goals.
    Learn more

Why Dell monitors?

  • Best selling
    As the world's number 1 monitor company,* we take pride in our unyielding commitment to quality and the utmost satisfaction of our customers.
  • A brand you can rely on
    Your monitor comes with a 3-year Advanced Exchange Service* so that if a replacement becomes necessary, it will be shipped to you the next business day during your 3-years Limited Hardware Warranty.*
  • Energy efficient
    We are committed to energy efficiency and the use of sustainable materials to reduce our environmental impact. Our latest monitors reflect this focus and use up to 33% less power than previous generations*.
  • Smarter Shopping Starts Here
    Shop confidently with the Dell Price Guarantee* on a wide selection of monitors, plus earn Dell Rewards* and more.
Dell Support

Support for all your needs, in one place.

Learn More

Learn More About Dell Monitors

Dell monitors offer exceptional display quality and reliable performance. Whether you’re looking for a 4K monitor for gaming, a curved monitor for immersive experiences, or a budget-friendly option for everyday use, Dell offers a wide range of choices to meet your needs. With ultra-thin bezels, high refresh rates, and vivid colour accuracy, Dell monitors are perfect for both professional and personal use. Explore the latest computer monitors range and find the best fit for your setup. ...

FAQs:

When choosing a computer monitor, consider screen size, resolution, refresh rate, and connectivity options. At Dell, popular features include UltraSharp displays for colour accuracy, curved screens for immersive viewing, and USB-C ports for easy connectivity.

Dell offers a range of exclusive discounts on high-quality displays. Whether you need a monitor for work, gaming, or entertainment, we have the perfect deal to suit your needs.

Yes, Dell offers a range of gaming monitors with high refresh rates and low response times. Models like the Alienware series are particularly popular among gamers for their performance and design.

Curved monitors reduce eye strain by following the natural curve of your eyes, providing a more immersive experience, especially for multitasking and gaming.

Yes, many Dell monitors come with the ability to daisy-chain multiple monitors, allowing for enhanced multitasking without additional graphics card inputs.

Full HD monitor (1920x1080) is great for basic tasks, while 4K monitor (3840x2160) offers sharper images for gaming and design. 6K monitor (6144x3456) is best for ultra-detailed content, such as 3D rendering.

Consider your primary use case: for general use, a Full HD monitor might suffice; for professional work, a 4K UltraSharp monitor could be ideal; and for gaming, look for high refresh rates and low response times. Dell’s monitor buying guide can also help you make an informed decision.

Yes, Dell provides free standard shipping on most monitors. Be sure to check the specific product page, as additional expedited shipping options may be available for select products and delivery locations. Visit Dell Shipping and Delivery FAQs for more information.

Monitor size is typically measured diagonally across the screen in inches (e.g., 27-inch monitor), but to ensure it fits your desk or mounting setup, you should also check the monitor’s physical dimensions—width, height, and depth—including the stand. These overall dimensions help determine the exact space the monitor will occupy. For example, a monitor with a smaller screen but a bulky stand might take up more desk depth than a larger screen with a small base. For wall mounting, always check the VESA mounting pattern and ensure the monitor’s weight (often listed separately) is supported by the chosen mount. If space-saving is important, look for slim bezel or bezel-less monitors, which reduce the monitor’s footprint without sacrificing screen size. Always review the monitor specifications before buying to ensure compatibility with your workspace or mount.

Marketing Campaign Claims/Disclaimers

i IDC Quarterly Server Tracker, 2024Q4, March 12, 2025, x86 and mainstream server revenue and units. Dell Technologies defines mainstream servers as standard racks, towers, blades, and large systems. Revenue share for x86 is a statistical tie. IDC declares a statistical tie in the worldwide server market when there is a difference of one percent or less in the share of revenues among two or more vendors.


* Important Dell Details: 

**Dell's Terms and Conditions: Apply to all sales available on request or at "Terms and Conditions of Sale" located at the bottom of our homepage at: www.dell.com.my 
    
Prices and specifications are correct at date of publication but subject to availability or change without notice. Promotional deals apply to maximum order size of 10 desktop or laptop systems. Dell cannot guarantee that promotions and prices listed online will be available to purchase by telephone.

Pricing: The pricing available on this site is Dell’s pricing for online purchases only. No promotional savings apply to Dell’s online pricing other than the savings listed on this site. Any promotional savings listed on this site are referenced off of a previous online price for the same product or service, unless otherwise stated. If you have contractual terms with Dell that refer to list pricing, please contact your Dell sales representative to obtain information about Dell’s list pricing.

Eligible business customers may save up to an additional 5% with Dell Premier and receive the best Dell.com online pricing on select products. Exclusions include limited quantity deals, limited time deals, client peripherals, Dell, Dell Premium, XPS, and Alienware.

Returns Policy: Dell’s “Returns Policy” found at www.dell.com.my applies to all sales. Choose carefully, as order cancellation rights are limited and additional costs may apply. 

Mistakes: While all efforts are made to check pricing and other errors, inadvertent errors do occur from time to time and Dell reserves the right to decline orders arising from such errors.

Onsite Service: Technician, replacement part or unit (depending on service contract) will be dispatched if necessary following phone-based troubleshooting. Subject to parts availability, geographical restrictions (on site and/or next business day service not available in some locations) and terms of service contract. Service timing dependent upon time of day call placed to Dell. Defective unit must be returned or paid for. Replacements may be refurbished . 

CompleteCover: Service is available for personal computers, Axim PDAs, Dell branded projectors and LCD TV. CompleteCover excludes theft, loss, and damage due to fire, intentional damage, acts of God or natural disasters, animals, pets or pests. Customer may be required to return unit to Dell. This service is only available in selected countries.

USB Type-C® and USB-C® are registered trademarks of USB Implementers Forum. Snapdragon is a trademark or registered trademark of Qualcomm Incorporated. Other trademarks may be trademarks of their respective owners.

Dell Rewards: 3% includes taxes and shipping. Rewards expire on the 15th day of the fourth month following the month in which they were earned. The total amount of Rewards that can be earned each Dell fiscal quarter shall not exceed RM 7,500 in Rewards. (The Dell fiscal calendar begins in February.) Outlet & Premier purchases do not qualify for rewards. Not valid for resellers and/or online auctions. Offers and rewards subject to change without notice, not combinable with all other offers. See full program terms here.

PC Game Pass: Subscription continues automatically at regular monthly price unless cancelled. Subject to xbox.com/subscriptionterms. Terms and exclusions apply. Featured games are not bundled with Alienware products unless otherwise stated.
